message: chore: Remove dead code (packages_gen.zig, native_modules*.zig, gen_packages.py)

files.patch:
@@ -1,12 +0,0 @@
-//! Native Modules - PyPI packages with Zig implementations
-//!
-//! This file re-exports the auto-generated native_modules_gen.zig
-//! which is built from packages/*/package.json
-//!
-//! To add a new PyPI override:
-//!   1. Create packages/{name}/package.json with "pypi": ["pypi-name"]
-//!   2. Run: python3 scripts/gen_packages.py
-//!
-//! See: .claude/CLAUDE.md for full documentation
-
-pub usingnamespace @import("native_modules_gen.zig");

@@ -1,31 +0,0 @@
-//! Auto-generated PyPI skip list
-//! DO NOT EDIT - Generated by scripts/gen_packages.py
-//!
-//! Packages with native Zig implementations.
-//! Package manager skips downloading these from PyPI.
-
-const std = @import("std");
-
-/// PyPI packages with native implementations
-pub const native_packages = [_][]const u8{
-    "requests",
-    "httpx",
-    "urllib3",
-    "aiohttp",
-    "regex",
-    "ujson",
-    "orjson",
-    "simplejson",
-    "tiktoken",
-    "tokenizers",
-    "websockets",
-    "websocket-client",
-};
-
-/// Check if package has native implementation
-pub fn hasNativeImpl(name: []const u8) bool {
-    for (native_packages) |pkg| {
-        if (std.ascii.eqlIgnoreCase(name, pkg)) return true;
-    }
-    return false;
-}

@@ -1,161 +0,0 @@
-#!/usr/bin/env python3
-"""
-Auto-generate package imports from packages/*/package.json
-
-Scans packages/ directory and generates:
-  - packages/pkg/src/native_modules_gen.zig  (PyPI skip list)
-  - src/codegen/native/packages_gen.zig      (Import mappings for codegen)
-
-Run: python3 scripts/gen_packages.py
-"""
-
-import json
-import os
-from pathlib import Path
-
-PACKAGES_DIR = Path("packages")
-OUTPUT_NATIVE_MODULES = Path("packages/pkg/src/native_modules_gen.zig")
-OUTPUT_PACKAGES_GEN = Path("src/codegen/native/packages_gen.zig")
-
-
-def scan_packages():
-    """Scan packages/ for package.json files"""
-    packages = []
-
-    for pkg_dir in sorted(PACKAGES_DIR.iterdir()):
-        if not pkg_dir.is_dir():
-            continue
-        if pkg_dir.name.startswith('.'):
-            continue
-
-        manifest_path = pkg_dir / "package.json"
-        if not manifest_path.exists():
-            continue
-
-        with open(manifest_path) as f:
-            manifest = json.load(f)
-
-        packages.append({
-            "name": manifest.get("name", pkg_dir.name),
-            "path": str(pkg_dir),
-            "root": manifest.get("root", "src/main.zig"),
-            "pypi": manifest.get("pypi", []),
-            "deps": manifest.get("deps", []),
-            "submodules": manifest.get("submodules", {}),
-            "optional": manifest.get("optional", False),
-        })
-
-    return packages
-
-
-def generate_native_modules(packages):
-    """Generate PyPI skip list"""
-    lines = [
-        "//! Auto-generated PyPI skip list",
-        "//! DO NOT EDIT - Generated by scripts/gen_packages.py",
-        "//!",
-        "//! Packages with native Zig implementations.",
-        "//! Package manager skips downloading these from PyPI.",
-        "",
-        "const std = @import(\"std\");",
-        "",
-        "/// PyPI packages with native implementations",
-        "pub const native_packages = [_][]const u8{",
-    ]
-
-    for pkg in packages:
-        for pypi_name in pkg["pypi"]:
-            lines.append(f'    "{pypi_name}",')
-
-    lines.extend([
-        "};",
-        "",
-        "/// Check if package has native implementation",
-        "pub fn hasNativeImpl(name: []const u8) bool {",
-        "    for (native_packages) |pkg| {",
-        "        if (std.ascii.eqlIgnoreCase(name, pkg)) return true;",
-        "    }",
-        "    return false;",
-        "}",
-        "",
-    ])
-
-    return "\n".join(lines)
-
-
-def generate_packages_gen(packages):
-    """Generate import mappings for codegen"""
-    lines = [
-        "//! Auto-generated package imports",
-        "//! DO NOT EDIT - Generated by scripts/gen_packages.py",
-        "//!",
-        "//! Scanned from packages/*/package.json",
-        "",
-        "const std = @import(\"std\");",
-        "",
-        "/// Package info",
-        "pub const PackageInfo = struct {",
-        "    name: []const u8,",
-        "    path: []const u8,",
-        "    root: []const u8,",
-        "    pypi_names: []const []const u8,",
-        "};",
-        "",
-        "/// All discovered packages",
-        "pub const packages = [_]PackageInfo{",
-    ]
-
-    for pkg in packages:
-        pypi_list = ", ".join(f'"{p}"' for p in pkg["pypi"])
-        lines.append(f'    .{{ .name = "{pkg["name"]}", .path = "{pkg["path"]}", .root = "{pkg["root"]}", .pypi_names = &.{{ {pypi_list} }} }},')
-
-    lines.extend([
-        "};",
-        "",
-        "/// Lookup package by name",
-        "pub fn getPackage(name: []const u8) ?PackageInfo {",
-        "    for (packages) |pkg| {",
-        "        if (std.mem.eql(u8, pkg.name, name)) return pkg;",
-        "    }",
-        "    return null;",
-        "}",
-        "",
-        "/// Lookup package by PyPI name",
-        "pub fn getPackageByPypi(pypi_name: []const u8) ?PackageInfo {",
-        "    for (packages) |pkg| {",
-        "        for (pkg.pypi_names) |name| {",
-        "            if (std.ascii.eqlIgnoreCase(name, pypi_name)) return pkg;",
-        "        }",
-        "    }",
-        "    return null;",
-        "}",
-        "",
-    ])
-
-    return "\n".join(lines)
-
-
-def main():
-    packages = scan_packages()
-
-    # Generate native_modules_gen.zig
-    native_modules_content = generate_native_modules(packages)
-    OUTPUT_NATIVE_MODULES.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
-    OUTPUT_NATIVE_MODULES.write_text(native_modules_content)
-
-    # Generate packages_gen.zig
-    packages_gen_content = generate_packages_gen(packages)
-    OUTPUT_PACKAGES_GEN.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
-    OUTPUT_PACKAGES_GEN.write_text(packages_gen_content)
-
-    # Summary
-    pypi_count = sum(len(p["pypi"]) for p in packages)
-    print(f"Generated package imports:")
-    print(f"  - Packages: {len(packages)}")
-    print(f"  - PyPI overrides: {pypi_count}")
-    print(f"  - {OUTPUT_NATIVE_MODULES}")
-    print(f"  - {OUTPUT_PACKAGES_GEN}")
-
-
-if __name__ == "__main__":
-    main()
